nasb.text: Drive out the scoffer, and contention will go out, Even strife and dishonor will cease.

esv.text: Drive out a scoffer, and strife will go out, and quarreling and abuse will cease.

cnv.text: 趕走好譏笑人的，紛爭就除去； 爭執和恥辱也必止息。

ccb.text: 赶走嘲讽者，纷争平息， 争吵和羞辱也会消除。

csbs.text: 驱逐讥讽者，纷争就离去， 争讼和羞辱也都会止息。
